hero.label: AI-Led Growth Consultancy
hero.title: Your company deserves to be found — by humans and AI.
hero.subtitle: You're spending on ads because organic isn't working. Your competitors rank above you. AI search is changing the game and you're not in it. We fix all three.
hero.secondaryLink: See how we diagnosed a company like yours →

services.label: What We Do
services.title: We make companies the top digital asset in their sector
services.description: Today, being "found" means more than Google rankings. Your customers search on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews. We make sure you show up everywhere that matters — and that the traffic you get actually drives revenue.

items.title: SEO & Generative Engine Optimization
items.description: Most companies pay for Google Ads because their website doesn't rank. We fix that — and go further. We make sure you show up when people search on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI answers too. Because that's where your next customers are already looking.

items.title: Traffic Architecture Diagnostics
items.description: Before we change anything, we break down exactly where your traffic comes from — and what percentage actually leads to revenue. Most companies discover that 80% of their visitors will never become customers. That's the gap we close.

items.title: Custom AI Engines
items.description: Purpose-built AI systems for your domain — product recommendation engines, intelligent content generation, automated workflows. Not ChatGPT wrappers, but engines designed around your specific business logic and data.

items.title: AI-First Transformation
items.description: The bigger play. Once we've proven impact on your digital presence, we help convert your entire operation into an AI-first architecture — from how you serve customers to how your team works. A fractional AI transformation lead, embedded in your business.

results.label: Proven Results
results.title: The sectors are different. The pattern is identical.
results.description: Every engagement starts the same way: a company spending on ads, underperforming on organic, and invisible to AI search. Here's what happens when you fix it.

items.title: Leading Dutch Publishing Group
items.description: Spending on ads across multiple brands with no organic strategy. We found that only 25 of their 700 monthly visits had commercial intent. Within 90 days, we restructured the entire organic architecture and built a custom AI engine that lifted paid performance by 56%.

items.title: EximPe
items.description: 11,000 monthly visitors — and almost none of them were potential customers. Classic content-traffic mismatch. We rebuilt the content architecture to align traffic with revenue, turning vanity metrics into commercial pipeline.

items.title: KnowESG
items.description: Competing against well-funded incumbents with no organic strategy. We deployed an AI-driven content architecture and entity-rich schema strategy that built organic authority in a regulation-heavy sector — and made them visible to AI search engines.

approach.label: How We Work
approach.title: Diagnose. Build. Scale.
approach.description: We don't hand over a strategy deck and disappear. We embed alongside your team and execute — proving the model before scaling.

items.title: Diagnose
items.description: Full digital diagnostic. Traffic architecture breakdown, technical SEO audit, GEO readiness assessment, AI visibility check, and competitive landscape analysis. You get a clear picture of where you stand — and exactly what to fix first.

items.title: Build
items.description: Execute the prioritized fix list. Schema markup, content restructuring, AI engine optimization, GEO implementation. Quick wins first, then strategic moves. Everything developer-ready with file paths, code, and exact copy.

items.title: Scale
items.description: Weekly scorecards, monthly strategy, quarterly roadmap. Prove results on one brand, replicate across the group. Expand from SEO/GEO into broader AI-first transformation as trust and results compound.

approach.callout: You'll see data in week one. Results in month one. ROI by month three. If it's not working, you'll know — and so will we. No 12-month lock-ins. No vague promises. Just transparent, measurable progress.

toolbar.description: We don't guess. Every recommendation is backed by the same data platforms used by enterprise growth teams.

vision.label: Where This Is Heading
vision.title: It starts with being found. It leads to something bigger.
vision.description: We start with what's proven: making you the top digital asset in your sector. But the relationship doesn't stop at SEO. As your trusted AI partner, we help your company become genuinely AI-first — in how you serve customers, make decisions, and operate day to day.

We analyze your digital footprint — traffic architecture, AI engine visibility, competitive positioning, and content quality using enterprise-grade tools.

faq.label: Frequently Asked
faq.title: Questions we hear in every first call

items.q: We already have an SEO agency. Why would we switch?
items.a: Most SEO agencies optimize for Google rankings alone. We go further — we optimize for AI engine citations (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) through Generative Engine Optimization. Plus, we start every engagement with a traffic architecture diagnostic that shows what percentage of your traffic actually drives revenue. Most agencies skip this step entirely.

items.q: How is this different from hiring a freelance SEO consultant?
items.a: A freelance consultant gives you advice. We give you execution. AskBodhi operates as a fractional growth team embedded in your business, using enterprise-grade tools like Ahrefs, Google Search Console, GA4, and AI visibility monitoring. You get the firepower of a full marketing department without hiring one.

items.q: We're a small team — we don't have bandwidth for a big project.
items.a: That's exactly who we're built for. Most of our clients don't have a marketing department — the founder or director handles digital alongside everything else. We execute, not just advise. You invest 5 minutes in an assessment, we do the heavy analytical lifting, and every deliverable comes developer-ready with exact file paths, code, and copy.

items.q: What's GEO and why should I care?
items.a: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimization — the discipline of getting your company cited by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overviews. These platforms are rapidly replacing traditional search for many queries. If your company isn't optimized for AI engines, you're invisible to a growing share of your potential customers.

items.q: How quickly will we see results?
items.a: You'll see data in week one — our diagnostic reveals exactly where you stand. Quick wins (technical fixes, schema markup, content restructuring) start delivering in month one. Measurable ROI against your ad spend typically shows by month three. We track everything transparently so you always know what's working.

items.q: Do you work with companies outside the Netherlands?
items.a: Yes. We're based in the Netherlands and serve clients across Europe and Asia. The methodology works wherever search engines and AI assistants exist. Our current portfolio spans the Netherlands, India, and global ESG markets.

intro.heading: How AI-ready is your company?
intro.description: Get a live digital analysis—we'll scan your site, benchmark competitors, and score your readiness across 5 dimensions.

q01.title: Let's start with you
q01.hint: We'll use this to send your AI Readiness Report.

q02.title: About your company
q02.hint: Your website URL is the most important field — it triggers our live analysis.

q04.title: Where do most of your customers find you today?

q05.title: Do you know what percentage of your website traffic actually drives revenue?
q05.hint: This is the question most companies can't answer.

options.no: No — we track traffic but not its commercial value

q06.title: Have you searched for your company in ChatGPT or Perplexity?
q06.hint: Try it now if you haven't. You might be surprised.

options.yes_cited: Yes — and we show up / get cited

q07.title: Does your website use structured data (schema markup)?
q07.hint: Schema helps both Google and AI engines understand your content.

options.some: Some — like basic Organization or breadcrumbs

q08.title: How would you describe your company's use of AI today?

options.none: We haven't started — AI isn't part of our operations
options.experimenting: A few people use ChatGPT or similar tools ad hoc
options.some: We've integrated AI into some specific workflows
options.embedded: AI is embedded across multiple business functions

q09.title: What's your biggest digital growth challenge?
q09.hint: Pick the one that keeps you up at night.

options.visibility: Getting found — we need more visibility
options.conversion: We get traffic but it doesn't convert
options.competitors: Competitors outrank us and we don't know why
options.ai_invisible: We're invisible in AI search results
options.scaling: We need to scale what works across more brands

q10.title: If we could fix one thing about your digital presence in the next 90 days — what would it be?
q10.hint: Be specific. We'll reference this directly in your report.
q10.placeholder: e.g. "Get our product pages ranking in Google's top 3 for our core terms" or "Show up when someone asks ChatGPT about our industry"

q11.title: One last thing — how did you find AskBodhi?

lines: Querying Ahrefs API for domain metrics...
Fetching domain rating and backlink profile...
scan.dataSource: Data sourced live from Ahrefs, Google PageSpeed & Perplexity
scan.fallback: Domain registered for analysis. Your full report will include live metrics.

competitors.heading: Who are your competitors?
competitors.description: List the companies you compete with for search visibility. We'll include them in your report.
competitors.placeholder:
e.g. competitor1.com, competitor2.com
or just company names like "Acme Corp, Globex"
competitors.note: Optional — we'll also identify competitors automatically in your report.
